# cpp-t2 v2 Atom Registry — INDEX

**Status:** L0 Foundation complete (CA-M01 deliverable). L1-L4 pending.
**Atom count (this index):** 30 (L0 only)
**Authoritative spec:** `docs/16_test2_specific_redesign_v2.md` §Part II + `docs/18_option4_milestone_plan.md` §Part 2.

---

## L0 Foundation (30 atoms)

L0 is **flat** — no S1-S6 internal staging. Atom-level mini-arcs handle progression.
Phase column matches the v2 spec phase grouping (A: code-is, B: skeleton, C: data+I/O, D: control, E: compound).
Depth column = longest dependency chain to that atom (topologically determined).

| Depth | ID | Phase | Name | Direct Prereqs | Used By |
|---|---|---|---|---|---|
| 0 | F-01 | A | Source code is plain text | — | Q1, Q2, Q3, Q4 |
| 1 | F-02 | A | Compiler turns source into program | F-01 | Q1, Q2, Q3, Q4 |
| 2 | F-03 | A | Hand-execution paradigm | F-01, F-02 | Q1, Q4 |
| 2 | F-04 | B | #include <iostream> | F-01, F-02 | Q3, Q4 |
| 3 | F-05 | B | using namespace std | F-04 | Q3, Q4 |
| 4 | F-07 | B | Statement terminator: semicolon | F-04, F-05 | Q1, Q2, Q3, Q4 |
| 5 | F-08 | B | Block delimiters: { and } | F-07 | Q1, Q2, Q3, Q4 |
| 6 | F-06 | B | int main() and return 0 | F-07, F-08 | Q4 |
| 5 | F-09 | C | Identifier rules + naming | F-07 | Q1, Q2, Q3, Q4 |
| 6 | F-10 | C | Primitive types: int, double, string | F-09 | Q1, Q2, Q3, Q4 |
| 7 | F-11 | C | Variable declaration + initialisation | F-10 | Q1, Q3, Q4 |
| 8 | F-12 | C | Assignment = | F-11 | Q1, Q4 |
| 9 | F-13 | C | cout chained output (parent) | F-04, F-05, F-12 | Q3, Q4 |
| 9 | F-13a | C | cout << operator direction | F-04, F-05 | Q3, Q4 |
| 10 | F-13b | C | cout chained values + endl | F-13a | Q3, Q4 |
| 9 | F-14 | C | cin >> token semantics (parent) | F-04, F-11 | Q3, Q4 |
| 10 | F-14a | C | cin >> operator direction | F-13a | Q3, Q4 |
| 11 | F-14b | C | cin reads one whitespace-delimited token | F-14a, F-10 | Q3, Q4 |
| 12 | F-15 | C | Prompt-then-read pair | F-13b, F-14b | Q3, Q4 |
| 9 | F-16 | D | Comparison operators | F-12 | Q1 |
| 10 | F-17 | D | if (cond) { ... } | F-16 | Q1 |
| 11 | F-18 | D | for counting loop (parent) | F-17, F-11 | Q1, Q3, Q4 |
| 11 | F-18a | D | for-loop header anatomy | F-17 | Q1, Q3, Q4 |
| 12 | F-18b | D | for-loop iteration order | F-18a | Q1, Q3, Q4 |
| 13 | F-19 | E | Fixed-size array T arr[N] | F-11, F-18b | Q1, Q3, Q4 |
| 7 | F-20 | E | struct definition (multi-field) | F-08, F-10 | Q1, Q2, Q3, Q4 |
| 14 | F-21 | E | Dot access obj.field | F-20, F-19 | Q1, Q3, Q4 |
| 15 | F-22 | E | Function def + params + pass-by-ref (parent) | F-08, F-21 | Q1, Q3 |
| 8 | F-22a | E | Function definition syntax | F-08, F-09, F-10 | Q1, Q3 |
| 16 | F-22b | E | Pass-by-reference & semantics | F-22a | Q1, Q3 |

---

## Phase summary

| Phase | Atoms | Theme | First-time depth range |
|---|---|---|---|
| A — What code IS | F-01, F-02, F-03 | Mental model: source vs executable, hand-execution | 0–2 |
| B — Skeleton scaffolding | F-04, F-05, F-06, F-07, F-08 | Boilerplate that wraps every Q4 main | 2–6 |
| C — Data + I/O | F-09, F-10, F-11, F-12, F-13/a/b, F-14/a/b, F-15 | Variables, assignment, terminal I/O | 5–12 |
| D — Control flow | F-16, F-17, F-18/a/b | Comparisons, if-gates, for-loops (Q1 engine) | 9–12 |
| E — Compound data + functions | F-19, F-20, F-21, F-22/a/b | Arrays, structs, dot-access, pass-by-ref | 7–16 |

**Critical-path note:** F-22b (pass-by-reference semantics) is the deepest atom (depth 16). It transitively depends on the entire skeleton + control + struct chain. Q3 cannot start until F-22b is FAMILIAR.

## Atom-to-Q track index (reverse lookup)

**Q1 Hand-execute (uses 24 of 30 atoms):**
F-01, F-02, F-03, F-07, F-08, F-09, F-10, F-11, F-12, F-16, F-17, F-18, F-18a, F-18b, F-19, F-20, F-21, F-22, F-22a, F-22b (and the cross-cutting Q-all atoms F-04 implicitly via skeleton context).

**Q2 Write struct (uses 8 atoms):**
F-01, F-02, F-07, F-08, F-09, F-10, F-20.  *(Q2 is intentionally narrow — F-20 is its central atom.)*

**Q3 Write read fn (uses 24 atoms):**
All A/B/C-phase atoms plus F-15 (prompt-pair), F-18/a/b (for-loop), F-19 (array param), F-21 (arr[i].field), F-22/a/b (function + pass-by-ref).

**Q4 Write main (uses 25 atoms):**
All except F-16, F-17 (Q1-only), F-22 (lower; main calls but doesn't define pass-by-ref). Q4 uses F-22a (function def syntax — the prototype) but is the call site, not definition site.

## Source-of-truth provenance

Every atom YAML in this registry cites:
1. **At least 1 PFG section** with verbatim quote and book §-anchor (path under `source-data/pfg-content/pfg-content/...`).
2. **At least 1 seminar timestamp** from `SIT102 Seminar - Mondays 6pm new (2).vtt` (Saloni's Test 2 walkthrough).

This satisfies RULE 4 (max quality) — no placeholder citations.

---

## Acceptance gate (CA-M08 — L0 Sign-off)

To close CA-M08, the following must hold:
1. All 30 atom YAMLs lint-clean (schema valid).
2. Every prereq edge resolves to an existing atom in this index.
3. `DAG.json` topological-sort produces 0 cycles.
4. Every atom has `cardCountTarget ≥ 6` and at least 2 distinct card types in `notes.cardMix`.
5. Every `commonMistakes` ID is referenced from at least one card (verified at CA-M07).
6. Every PFG `ref` resolves to a real path under `source-data/pfg-content/pfg-content/...`.
7. Every seminar `ref` timestamp lies within the source VTT.

This index = pre-CA-M08 baseline.
